{{Quote|The battle at Fondor was a total rout. We did them great damage, and now we have a secure i position from which to strike at Coruscant.|Garm Bel Iblis|<ref name="Prophecy" />}}
A '''battle at Fondor''' took place in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], near the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It saw the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] retake the vital [[Fondor Shipyards/Legends|Fondor Shipyards]] that had fallen into [[Yuuzhan Vong]] hands. In order to draw off Yuuzhan Vong reinforcements from [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]], the Alliance staged a [[Battle of the Duro system|decoy attack]] on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] at the same time. The commander at Duro requested reinforcements from the Fondor commander, [[Zhat Lah]], who complied, leaving his station relatively undefended. When he saw the ruse, Lah attempt to recall his fleet from Duro, but was incapable due to the Alliance [[Interdictor/Legends|interdictors]]. When the situation became hopeless, Lah recalled the remainder of his forces: two [[ro'ik chuun m'arh]] and a [[miid ro'ik]].

Although it served its objectives, and the Alliance took Fondor, the move was extremely opposed by [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] soldiers and civilians afterwards.

==Appearances==
